description_long: This is a stylized, angular airplane with a predominantly red body and dark gray accents, featuring a sleek, pointed nose and a forward-mounted cockpit with green-tinted windows. The wings are sharply swept back and positioned at a mid-fuselage height, with small upward-angled winglets at the tips. The rear of the airplane is equipped with two large, cylindrical jet engines that are mounted side-by-side, and the tail section features twin vertical stabilizers canted outward in a V-tail configuration. The undercarriage and landing gear are not visible, suggesting a streamlined, possibly retractable design. The overall form is compact and futuristic, with smooth, hard surfaces and minimal surface detailing.
description: A compact, red airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, twin rear jet engines, and a V-tail, featuring a forward cockpit and sleek, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit with green windows, and the wide, swept wings with upward-angled tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated nose, cockpit placement, and the angular, streamlined fuselage with visible engine housing at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin cylindrical jet engines, V-tail configuration, and the full wingspan with upward-angled winglets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular body, cockpit, and the rear engine and tail assembly.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with small upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or concealed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and green-tinted windows.
